description: The RawDataTool component is used in many different tool creations to allow for getting tool related actions on the hand its equipped in. This component has a ProtoFlux node associated with it (RawDataTool Events)

fields.LocalTipOffset: How much to offset the tool and its laser
fields.LocalTipReference: The slot to use for the laser source and tip location.
fields.UseLaser: Whether to enable the use of and visual of the Laser.
fields.BlockPrimaryWhenTouching: blocks use of primary when the tool is touching a wall.
fields.UseSecondary: Allow for use of secondary. When disabled on quest this disables the Tank Controls mode which many quest users in the resonite community dislike.
fields.AllowUseWhenHolding: Allow use of the tool when the user is holding onto the tool rather than having it equipped.
fields.Equipped: Whether the tool is equipped or not. This will still return true if the user is holding onto the tip. Commonly referred to as "Soft Equipping" or "Pseudo Equipping".
fields.ControllerType: The Type (C# class) of the controller holding this tool.
fields.ControllerSide: Whether the left, right, or none controller is holding this tool.
fields.PrimaryStrength: The live updated value of the user's primary strength on this hand. Applies to VRcontrollers or game pad type controllers.
fields.SecondaryAxis: The position of the thumb on the track pad used for secondary on this hand.
fields.Primary: Whether the user is pressing primary on this hand. See Controls
fields.Secondary: Whether the user is pressing secondary on this hand. See Controls.
fields._primaryStrengthStream: The value stream of the primary strength value. This comes from a user's value streams which can be viewed through a User Inspector.
fields._secondaryAxisStream: The value stream of the secondary strength value. This comes from a user's value streams which can be viewed through a User Inspector.
fields._primaryStream: The value stream of the primary pressed value. This comes from a user's value streams which can be viewed through a User Inspector.
fields._secondaryStream: The value stream of the secondary pressed value. This comes from a user's value streams which can be viewed through a User Inspector.
fields._rawStrength: The Raw unfiltered value of the primary strength value.
fields._rawAxis: the Raw unfiltered value of the secondary axis value.
fields._rawPrimary: the Raw unfiltered value of the primary pressed value.
fields._rawSecondary: the Raw unfiltered value of the secondary pressed value.
fields.PrimaryActionDescription: sets the label that tells the user what primary on this tool does.
fields.SecondaryActionDescription: sets the label that tells the user what secondary on this tool does.

usage:
Attach to a slot and this component will generate the needed slots for this tool to work. This component will need a collider in its slot hierarchy so the tool can be grabbed and used. Combining this tool with protoflux or Components is needed to add custom behavior.
It's a good idea to keep the tool's visuals in a child slot to allow for later alignment. Note that scale can change between users.
